name: Songkran
traditions: Water splashing and water fights; visiting temples; building sand stupas; pouring scented water over elders' hands; releasing fish and birds.
historicalBackground: Songkran originated as a ritual cleansing for the Thai New Year based on the solar calendar. Water symbolizes purification and the washing away of misfortune.
description: The Thai New Year water festival, where streets transform into massive water fights symbolizing purification and renewal.
